name: Leading the Pack - Houndoom PMD
description:
Art by HanzoTitmada on FurAffinity.

Explorer’s Guild Dossier – Team Breakthrough
Compiled by Chatot, Head Administrator

Houndoom – “The Brooding Inferno”

Affiliation: Team Breakthrough (Independent)
Role: Strategist (Reluctantly), Enforcer, Cook (Apparently?)

Where do I begin with this one? Houndoom is Team Breakthrough’s self-appointed voice of reason—though how much “reason” can be expected from a Fire-type with literal smoke curling from his nostrils is... questionable. Unlike his chaotic teammates, Houndoom prefers silence, solitude, and a good patch of sand under his paws. Don’t be fooled by the stoic exterior, however—underneath that gruff silence is a smoldering temper just waiting to ignite.

He rarely speaks unless necessary, but when he does, it’s usually to scold Salamence (again), issue orders during a skirmish, or mumble something cryptic while roasting Apples over his own fire. He does seem to have a knack for tactics and battlefield awareness, which makes him the default planner for Team Breakthrough... much to his dismay. He doesn’t enjoy the spotlight, doesn’t follow Guild protocols, and—if I may be blunt—has no patience for authority.

There are rumors he wasn’t always a Pokémon, and that he occasionally stares out to sea like it’ll give him answers. Frankly, I don’t have the time to entertain existential mysteries.

If you see him, avoid eye contact, offer food cautiously, and do not ask him about his past. He will growl.

—Chatot, Head Administrator
P.S. If you find bite marks on Guild supplies, it was probably him.
